translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The righteous as a palm-tree flourisheth, As a cedar in Lebanon he groweth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Those planted in the house of Jehovah, In the courts of our God do flourish.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Still they bring forth in old age, Fat and flourishing are they,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To declare that upright [is] Jehovah my rock, And there is no perverseness in Him!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah hath reigned, Excellency He hath put on, Jehovah put on strength, He girded Himself, Also -- established is the world, unmoved.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Established is Thy throne since then, From the age Thou [art].

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Floods have lifted up, O Jehovah, Floods have lifted up their voice, Floods lift up their breakers.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Than the voices of many mighty waters, Breakers of a sea, mighty on high [is] Jehovah,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thy testimonies have been very stedfast, To Thy house comely [is] holiness, O Jehovah, for length of days!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: God of vengeance -- Jehovah! God of vengeance, shine forth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Be lifted up, O Judge of the earth, Send back a recompence on the proud.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Till when [do] the wicked, O Jehovah? Till when do the wicked exult?

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They utter -- they speak an old saw, All working iniquity do boast themselves.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thy people, O Jehovah, they bruise, And Thine inheritance they afflict.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Widow and sojourner they slay, And fatherless ones they murder.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they say, 'Jehovah doth not see, And the God of Jacob doth not consider.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Consider, ye brutish among the people, And ye foolish, when do ye act wisely?

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He who planteth the ear doth He not hear? He who formeth the eye doth He not see?

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He who is instructing nations, Doth He not reprove? He who is teaching man knowledge [is] Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He knoweth the thoughts of man, that they [are] vanity.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: O the happiness of the man Whom Thou instructest, O Jah, And out of Thy law teachest him,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To give rest to him from days of evil, While a pit is digged for the wicked.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For Jehovah leaveth not His people, And His inheritance forsaketh not.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For to righteousness judgment turneth back, And after it all the upright of heart,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who riseth up for me with evil doers? Who stationeth himself for me with workers of iniquity?

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Unless Jehovah [were] a help to me, My soul had almost inhabited silence.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: If I have said, 'My foot hath slipped,' Thy kindness, O Jehovah, supporteth me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In the abundance of my thoughts within me, Thy comforts delight my soul.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Is a throne of mischief joined [with] Thee? A framer of perverseness by statute?

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They decree against the soul of the righteous, And innocent blood declare wicked.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah is for a high place to me, And my God [is] for a rock -- my refuge,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And turneth back on them their iniquity, And in their wickedness cutteth them off; Jehovah our God doth cut them off!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Come, we sing to Jehovah, We shout to the rock of our salvation.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: We come before His face with thanksgiving, With psalms we shout to Him.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For a great God [is] Jehovah, And a great king over all gods.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In whose hand [are] the deep places of earth, And the strong places of hills [are] His.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Whose is the sea, and He made it, And His hands formed the dry land.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Come in, we bow ourselves, and we bend, We kneel before Jehovah our Maker.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For He [is] our God, and we the people of His pasture, And the flock of His hand, To-day, if to His voice ye hearken,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Harden not your heart as [in] Meribah, As [in] the day of Massah in the wilderness,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Where your fathers have tried Me, Have proved Me, yea, have seen My work.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Forty years I am weary of the generation, And I say, 'A people erring in heart -- they! And they have not known My ways:'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Where I sware in Mine anger, 'If they come in unto My rest -- !'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Sing to Jehovah a new song, Sing to Jehovah all the earth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Sing to Jehovah, bless His name, Proclaim from day to day His salvation.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Declare among nations His honour, Among all the peoples His wonders.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For great [is] Jehovah, and praised greatly, Fearful He [is] over all gods.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For all the gods of the peoples [are] nought, And Jehovah made the heavens.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Honour and majesty [are] before Him, Strength and beauty in His sanctuary.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Ascribe to Jehovah, O families of the peoples, Ascribe to Jehovah honour and strength.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Ascribe to Jehovah the honour of His name, Lift up a present and come in to His courts.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Bow yourselves to Jehovah, In the honour of holiness, Be afraid of His presence, all the earth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Say among nations, 'Jehovah hath reigned, Also -- established is the world, unmoved, He judgeth the peoples in uprightness.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The heavens joy, and the earth is joyful, The sea and its fulness roar.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The field exulteth, and all that [is] in it, Then sing do all trees of the forest,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Before Jehovah, for He hath come, For He hath come to judge the earth. He judgeth the world in righteousness, And the peoples in His faithfulness!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah hath reigned, The earth is joyful, many isles rejoice.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Cloud and darkness [are] round about Him, Righteousness and judgment the basis of His throne.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Fire before Him goeth, And burneth round about His adversaries.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Lightened have His lightnings the world, The earth hath seen, and is pained.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Hills, like wax, melted before Jehovah, Before the Lord of all the earth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The heavens declared His righteousness, And all the peoples have seen His honour.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Ashamed are all servants of a graven image, Those boasting themselves in idols, Bow yourselves to him, all ye gods.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Zion hath heard and rejoiceth, And daughters of Judah are joyful, Because of Thy judgments, O Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For Thou, Jehovah, [art] Most High over all the earth, Greatly Thou hast been exalted over all gods.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Ye who love Jehovah, hate evil, He is keeping the souls of His saints, From the hand of the wicked he delivereth them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Light [is] sown for the righteous, And for the upright of heart -- joy.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Rejoice, ye righteous, in Jehovah, And give thanks at the remembrance of his holiness!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A Psalm. Sing ye to Jehovah a new song, For wonders He hath done, Given salvation to Him hath His right hand and His holy arm.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah hath made known His salvation, Before the eyes of the nations, He hath revealed His righteousness,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath remembered His kindness, And His faithfulness to the house of Israel, All ends of earth have seen the salvation of our God.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Shout to Jehovah, all the earth, Break forth, and cry aloud, and sing.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Sing to Jehovah with harp, With harp, and voice of praise,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: With trumpets, and voice of a cornet, Shout ye before the king Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Roar doth the sea and its fulness, The world and the inhabitants in it.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Floods clap hand, together hills cry aloud,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Before Jehovah, For He hath come to judge the earth, He judgeth the world in righteousness, And the people in uprightness!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah hath reigned, peoples tremble, The Inhabitant of the cherubs, the earth shaketh.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah in Zion [is] great, And high He [is] over all the peoples.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They praise Thy name, 'Great, and fearful, holy [it] is.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the strength of the king Hath loved judgment, Thou -- Thou hast established uprightness; Judgment and righteousness in Jacob, Thou -- Thou hast done.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Exalt ye Jehovah our God, And bow yourselves at His footstool, holy [is] He.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Moses and Aaron among His priests, And Samuel among those proclaiming His name. They are calling unto Jehovah, And He doth answer them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In a pillar of cloud He speaketh unto them, They have kept His testimonies, And the statute He hath given to them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: O Jehovah, our God, Thou hast afflicted them, A God forgiving Thou hast been to them, And taking vengeance on their actions.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Exalt ye Jehovah our God, And bow yourselves at His holy hill, For holy [is] Jehovah our God!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A Psalm of Thanksgiving. Shout to Jehovah, all the earth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Serve Jehovah with joy, come before him with singing.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Know that Jehovah He [is] God, He made us, and we are His, His people -- and the flock of His pasture.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Enter ye His gates with thanksgiving, His courts with praise, Give ye thanks to Him, bless ye His Name.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For good [is] Jehovah, to the age His kindness, And to generation and generation His faithfulness!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A Psalm of David. Kindness and judgment I sing, To Thee, O Jehovah, I sing praise.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I act wisely in a perfect way, When dost Thou come in unto me? I walk habitually in the integrity of my heart, In the midst of my house.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I set not before mine eyes a worthless thing, The work of those turning aside I have hated, It adhereth not to me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A perverse heart turneth aside from me, Wickedness I know not.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Whoso slandereth in secret his neighbour, Him I cut off, The high of eyes and proud of heart, him I endure not.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Mine eyes are on the faithful of the land, To dwell with me, Whoso is walking in a perfect way, he serveth me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He dwelleth not in my house who is working deceit, Whoso is speaking lies Is not established before mine eyes.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: At morning I cut off all the wicked of the land, To cut off from the city of Jehovah All the workers of iniquity!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A Prayer of the afflicted when he is feeble, and before Jehovah poureth out his plaint. O Jehovah, hear my prayer, yea, my cry to Thee cometh.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Hide not Thou Thy face from me, In a day of mine adversity, Incline unto me Thine ear, In the day I call, haste, answer me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For consumed in smoke have been my days, And my bones as a fire-brand have burned.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Smitten as the herb, and withered, is my heart, For I have forgotten to eat my bread.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: From the voice of my sighing Hath my bone cleaved to my flesh.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I have been like to a pelican of the wilderness, I have been as an owl of the dry places.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I have watched, and I am As a bird alone on the roof.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All the day mine enemies reproached me, Those mad at me have sworn against me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Because ashes as bread I have eaten, And my drink with weeping have mingled,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: From Thine indignation and Thy wrath, For Thou hast lifted me up, And dost cast me down.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: My days as a shadow [are] stretched out, And I -- as the herb I am withered.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Thou, O Jehovah, to the age abidest, And Thy memorial to all generations.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thou -- Thou risest -- Thou pitiest Zion, For the time to favour her, For the appointed time hath come.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For Thy servants have been pleased with her stones, And her dust they favour.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And nations fear the name of Jehovah, And all kings of the earth Thine honour,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For Jehovah hath builded Zion, He hath been seen in His honour,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He turned unto the prayer of the destitute, And He hath not despised their prayer.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: This is written for a later generation, And the people created do praise Jah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For He hath looked From the high place of His sanctuary. Jehovah from heaven unto earth looked attentively,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To hear the groan of the prisoner, To loose sons of death,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To declare in Zion the name of Jehovah, And His praise in Jerusalem,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In the peoples being gathered together, And the kingdoms -- to serve Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath humbled in the way my power, He hath shortened my days.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I say, 'My God, take me not up in the midst of my days,' Through all generations [are] Thine years.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Beforetime the earth Thou didst found, And the work of Thy hands [are] the heavens.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They -- They perish, and Thou remainest, And all of them as a garment become old, As clothing Thou changest them, And they are changed.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Thou [art] the same, and Thine years are not finished.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The sons of Thy servants do continue, And their seed before Thee is established!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: By David. Bless, O my soul, Jehovah, And all my inward parts -- His Holy Name.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Bless, O my soul, Jehovah, And forget not all His benefits,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who is forgiving all thine iniquities, Who is healing all thy diseases,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who is redeeming from destruction thy life, Who is crowning thee -- kindness and mercies,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who is satisfying with good thy desire, Renew itself as an eagle doth thy youth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah is doing righteousness and judgments For all the oppressed.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He maketh known His ways to Moses, To the sons of Israel His acts.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Merciful and gracious [is] Jehovah, Slow to anger, and abundant in mercy.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Not for ever doth He strive, Nor to the age doth He watch.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Not according to our sins hath He done to us, Nor according to our iniquities Hath He conferred benefits upon us.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For, as the height of the heavens [is] above the earth, His kindness hath been mighty over those fearing Him.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: As the distance of east from west He hath put far from us our transgressions.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: As a father hath mercy on sons, Jehovah hath mercy on those fearing Him.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For He hath known our frame, Remembering that we [are] dust.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Mortal man! as grass [are] his days, As a flower of the field so he flourisheth;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For a wind hath passed over it, and it is not, And its place doth not discern it any more.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the kindness of Jehovah [Is] from age even unto age on those fearing Him, And His righteousness to sons' sons,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To those keeping His covenant, And to those remembering His precepts to do them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah in the heavens Hath established His throne, And His kingdom over all hath ruled.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Bless Jehovah, ye His messengers, Mighty in power -- doing His word, To hearken to the voice of His Word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Bless Jehovah, all ye His hosts, His ministers -- doing His pleasure.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Bless Jehovah, all ye His works, In all places of His dominion. Bless, O my soul, Jehovah!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Bless, O my soul, Jehovah! Jehovah, my God, Thou hast been very great, Honour and majesty Thou hast put on.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Covering himself [with] light as a garment, Stretching out the heavens as a curtain,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who is laying the beam of His upper chambers in the waters, Who is making thick clouds His chariot, Who is walking on wings of wind,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Making His messengers -- the winds, His ministers -- the flaming fire.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath founded earth on its bases, It is not moved to the age and for ever.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The abyss! as with clothing Thou hast covered it, Above hills do waters stand.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: From Thy rebuke they flee, From the voice of Thy thunder haste away.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They go up hills -- they go down valleys, Unto a place Thou hast founded for them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A border Thou hast set, they pass not over, They turn not back to cover the earth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who is sending forth fountains in valleys, Between hills they go on.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They water every beast of the field, Wild asses break their thirst.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: By them the fowl of the heavens doth dwell, From between the branches They give forth the voice.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Watering hills from His upper chambers, From the fruit of Thy works is the earth satisfied.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Causing grass to spring up for cattle, And herb for the service of man, To bring forth bread from the earth,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And wine -- it rejoiceth the heart of man, To cause the face to shine from oil, And bread -- the heart of man it supporteth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Satisfied [are] the trees of Jehovah, Cedars of Lebanon that He hath planted,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Where birds do make nests, The stork -- the firs [are] her house.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The high hills [are] for wild goats, Rocks [are] a refuge for conies,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He made the moon for seasons, The sun hath known his place of entrance.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thou settest darkness, and it is night, In it doth every beast of the forest creep.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The young lions are roaring for prey, And to seek from God their food.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The sun riseth, they are gathered, And in their dens they crouch.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Man goeth forth to his work, And to his service -- till evening.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: How many have been Thy works, O Jehovah, All of them in wisdom Thou hast made, Full is the earth of thy possessions.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: This, the sea, great and broad of sides, There [are] moving things -- innumerable, Living creatures -- small with great.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: There do ships go: leviathan, That Thou hast formed to play in it.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All of them unto Thee do look, To give their food in its season.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thou dost give to them -- they gather, Thou dost open Thy hand -- they [are] satisfied [with] good.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thou hidest Thy face -- they are troubled, Thou gatherest their spirit -- they expire, And unto their dust they turn back.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thou sendest out Thy Spirit, they are created, And Thou renewest the face of the ground.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The honour of Jehovah is to the age, Jehovah rejoiceth in His works,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who is looking to earth, and it trembleth, He cometh against hills, and they smoke.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I sing to Jehovah during my life, I sing praise to my God while I exist.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Sweet is my meditation on Him, I -- I do rejoice in Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Consumed are sinners from the earth, And the wicked are no more. Bless, O my soul, Jehovah. Praise ye Jehovah!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Give ye thanks to Jehovah -- call ye in His name, Make known among the peoples His acts.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Sing ye to Him -- sing praise to Him, Meditate ye on all His wonders.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Boast yourselves in His Holy Name, The heart of those seeking Jehovah rejoiceth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Seek ye Jehovah and His strength, Seek ye His face continually.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Remember His wonders that He did, His signs and the judgments of His mouth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: O seed of Abraham, His servant, O sons of Jacob, His chosen ones.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He [is] Jehovah our God, In all the earth [are] His judgments.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath remembered to the age His covenant, The word He commanded to a thousand generations,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: That He hath made with Abraham, And His oath to Isaac,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And doth establish it to Jacob for a statute, To Israel -- a covenant age-during,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Saying, 'To thee I give the land of Canaan, The portion of your inheritance,'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In their being few in number, But a few, and sojourners in it.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they go up and down, from nation unto nation, From a kingdom unto another people.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath not suffered any to oppress them And He reproveth for their sakes kings.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Strike not against Mine anointed, And to My prophets do not evil.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He calleth a famine on the land, The whole staff of bread He hath broken.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath sent before them a man, For a servant hath Joseph been sold.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They have afflicted with fetters his feet, Iron hath entered his soul,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Till the time of the coming of His word The saying of Jehovah hath tried him.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The king hath sent, and looseth him, The ruler of the peoples, and draweth him out.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath made him lord of his house, And ruler over all his possessions.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To bind his chiefs at his pleasure, And his elders he maketh wise.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Israel cometh in to Egypt, And Jacob hath sojourned in the land of Ham.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He maketh His people very fruitful, And maketh it mightier than its adversaries.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He turned their heart to hate His people, To conspire against His servants.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath sent Moses His servant, Aaron whom He had fixed on.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They have set among them the matters of His signs, And wonders in the land of Ham.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath sent darkness, and it is dark, And they have not provoked His word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath turned their waters to blood, And putteth to death their fish.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Teemed hath their land [with] frogs, In the inner chambers of their kings.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath said, and the beetle cometh, Lice into all their border.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath made their showers hail, A flaming fire [is] in their land.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He smiteth their vine and their fig, And shivereth the trees of their border.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath said, and the locust cometh, And the cankerworm -- innumerable,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And it consumeth every herb in their land, And it consumeth the fruit of their ground.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He smiteth every first-born in their land, The first-fruit of all their strength,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And bringeth them out with silver and gold, And there is not in its tribes a feeble one.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Rejoiced hath Egypt in their going forth, For their fear had fallen upon them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath spread a cloud for a covering, And fire to enlighten the night.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They have asked, and He bringeth quails, And [with] bread of heaven satisfieth them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath opened a rock, and waters issue, They have gone on in dry places -- a river.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For He hath remembered His holy word, With Abraham His servant,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He bringeth forth His people with joy, With singing His chosen ones.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He giveth to them the lands of nations, And the labour of peoples they possess,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: That they may observe His statutes, And His laws may keep. Praise ye Jehovah!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Praise ye Jah, give thanks to Jehovah, For good, for to the age, [is] His kindness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who doth utter the mighty acts of Jehovah? Soundeth all His praise?

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: O the happiness of those keeping judgment, Doing righteousness at all times.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Remember me, O Jehovah, With the favour of Thy people, Look after me in Thy salvation.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To look on the good of Thy chosen ones, To rejoice in the joy of Thy nation, To boast myself with Thine inheritance.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: We have sinned with our fathers, We have done perversely, we have done wickedly.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Our fathers in Egypt, Have not considered wisely Thy wonders, They have not remembered The abundance of Thy kind acts, And provoke by the sea, at the sea of Suph.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He saveth them for His name's sake, To make known His might,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And rebuketh the sea of Suph, and it is dried up, And causeth them to go Through depths as a wilderness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He saveth them from the hand Of him who is hating, And redeemeth them from the hand of the enemy.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And waters cover their adversaries, One of them hath not been left.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they believe in His words, they sing His praise,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They have hasted -- forgotten His works, They have not waited for His counsel.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they lust greatly in a wilderness, And try God in a desert.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He giveth to them their request, And sendeth leanness into their soul.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they are envious of Moses in the camp, Of Aaron, Jehovah's holy one.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Earth openeth, and swalloweth up Dathan, And covereth over the company of Abiram.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And fire burneth among their company, A flame setteth on fire the wicked.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They make a calf in Horeb, And bow themselves to a molten image,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And change their Honour Into the form of an ox eating herbs.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They have forgotten God their saviour, The doer of great things in Egypt,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of wonderful things in the land of Ham, Of fearful things by the sea of Suph.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He saith to destroy them, Unless Moses, His chosen one, Had stood in the breach before Him, To turn back His wrath from destroying.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they kick against the desirable land, They have not given credence to His word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they murmur in their tents, They have not hearkened to the voice of Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He lifteth up His hand to them, To cause them to fall in a wilderness,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And to cause their seed to fall among nations, And to scatter them through lands.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they are coupled to Baal-Peor, And eat the sacrifices of the dead,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they provoke to anger by their actions, And a plague breaketh forth upon them,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Phinehas standeth, and executeth judgment, And the plague is restrained,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And it is reckoned to him to righteousness, To all generations -- unto the age.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they cause wrath by the waters of Meribah, And it is evil to Moses for their sakes,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For they have provoked his spirit, And he speaketh wrongfully with his lips.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They have not destroyed the peoples, As Jehovah had said to them,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And mix themselves among nations, and learn their works,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And serve their idols, And they are to them for a snare.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they sacrifice their sons And their daughters to destroyers,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they shed innocent blood -- Blood of their sons and of their daughters, Whom they have sacrificed to idols of Canaan, And the land is profaned with blood.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they are defiled with their works, And commit whoredom in their habitual doings.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the anger of Jehovah Is kindled against His people, And He doth abominate His inheritance.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And giveth them into the hand of nations, And those hating them rule over them,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And their enemies oppress them, And they are humbled under their hand.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Many times He doth deliver them, And they rebel in their counsel, And they are brought low in their iniquity.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He looketh on their distress When He heareth their cry,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And remembereth for them His covenant, And is comforted, According to the abundance of His kindness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He appointeth them for mercies Before all their captors.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Save us, O Jehovah our God, and gather us from the nations, To give thanks to Thy holy name, To glory in Thy praise.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Blessed [is] Jehovah, God of Israel, From the age even unto the age. And all the people said, 'Amen, praise Jah!'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Give ye thanks to Jehovah, For good, for to the age [is] His kindness:'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Let the redeemed of Jehovah say, Whom He redeemed from the hand of an adversary.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And from the lands hath gathered them, From east and from west, From north, and from the sea.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They wandered in a wilderness, in a desert by the way, A city of habitation they have not found.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Hungry -- yea -- thirsty, Their soul in them becometh feeble,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they cry unto Jehovah in their adversity, From their distress He delivereth them,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And causeth them to tread in a right way, To go unto a city of habitation.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They confess to Jehovah His kindness, And His wonders to the sons of men.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For He hath satisfied a longing soul, And a hungry soul hath filled [with] goodness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Inhabitants of dark places and death-shade, Prisoners of affliction and of iron,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Because they changed the saying of God, And the counsel of the Most High despised.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He humbleth with labour their heart, They have been feeble, and there is no helper.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they cry unto Jehovah in their adversity, From their distresses He saveth them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He bringeth them out from the dark place, And death-shade, And their bands He draweth away.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They confess to Jehovah His kindness, And His wonders to the sons of men.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For He hath broken doors of brass, And bars of iron He hath cut.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Fools, by means of their transgression, And by their iniquities, afflict themselves.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All food doth their soul abominate, And they come nigh unto the gates of death,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And cry unto Jehovah in their adversity, From their distresses He saveth them,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He sendeth His word and healeth them, And delivereth from their destructions.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They confess to Jehovah His kindness, And His wonders to the sons of men,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they sacrifice sacrifices of thanksgiving, And recount His works with singing.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Those going down [to] the sea in ships, Doing business in many waters,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They have seen the works of Jehovah, And His wonders in the deep.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He saith, and appointeth a tempest, And it lifteth up its billows,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They go up [to] the heavens, they go down [to] the depths, Their soul in evil is melted.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They reel to and fro, and move as a drunkard, And all their wisdom is swallowed up.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they cry to Jehovah in their adversity, And from their distresses He bringeth them out.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He establisheth a whirlwind to a calm, And hushed are their billows.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they rejoice because they are quiet, And He leadeth them to the haven of their desire.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They confess to Jehovah His kindness, And His wonders to the sons of men,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they exalt Him in the assembly of the people, And in the seat of the elders praise Him.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He maketh rivers become a wilderness, And fountains of waters become dry land.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A fruitful land becometh a barren place, For the wickedness of its inhabitants.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He maketh a wilderness become a pool of water, And a dry land become fountains of waters.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He causeth the hungry to dwell there, And they prepare a city of habitation.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they sow fields, and plant vineyards, And they make fruits of increase.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And He blesseth them, and they multiply exceedingly, And their cattle He doth not diminish.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they are diminished, and bow down, By restraint, evil, and sorrow.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He is pouring contempt upon nobles, And causeth them to wander in vacancy -- no way.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And setteth on high the needy from affliction, And placeth families as a flock.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The upright do see and rejoice, And all perversity hath shut her mouth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who [is] wise, and observeth these? They understand the kind acts of Jehovah!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A Song, a Psalm of David. Prepared is my heart, O God, I sing, yea, I sing praise, also my honour.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Awake, psaltery and harp, I awake the dawn.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I thank Thee among peoples, O Jehovah, And I praise Thee among the nations.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For great above the heavens [is] Thy kindness, And unto the clouds Thy truth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Be Thou exalted above the heavens, O God, And above all the earth Thy honour.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: That Thy beloved ones may be delivered, Save [with] Thy right hand, and answer us.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: God hath spoken in His holiness: I exult, I apportion Shechem, And the valley of Succoth I measure,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Mine [is] Gilead, mine [is] Manasseh, And Ephraim [is] the strength of my head, Judah [is] my lawgiver,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Moab [is] a pot for my washing, Upon Edom I cast my shoe, Over Philistia I shout habitually.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who doth bring me in to the fenced city? Who hath led me unto Edom?

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Hast not Thou, O God, cast us off? And Thou goest not out, O God, with our hosts!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Give to us help from adversity, And vain is the salvation of man.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In God we do mightily, And He doth tread down our adversaries!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To the Overseer. -- A Psalm of David. O God of my praise, be not silent,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For the mouth of wickedness, and the mouth of deceit, Against me they have opened, They have spoken with me -- A tongue of falsehood, and words of hatred!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They have compassed me about, And they fight me without cause.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For my love they oppose me, and I -- prayer!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they set against me evil for good, And hatred for my love.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Appoint Thou over him the wicked, And an adversary standeth at his right hand.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In his being judged, he goeth forth wicked, And his prayer is for sin.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: His days are few, his oversight another taketh,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: His sons are fatherless, and his wife a widow.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And wander continually do his sons, Yea, they have begged, And have sought out of their dry places.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: An exactor layeth a snare for all that he hath, And strangers spoil his labour.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath none to extend kindness, Nor is there one showing favour to his orphans.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: His posterity is for cutting off, In another generation is their name blotted out.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The iniquity of his fathers Is remembered unto Jehovah, And the sin of his mother is not blotted out.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They are before Jehovah continually, And He cutteth off from earth their memorial.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Because that he hath not remembered to do kindness, And pursueth the poor man and needy, And the smitten of heart -- to slay,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And he loveth reviling, and it meeteth him, And he hath not delighted in blessing, And it is far from him.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And he putteth on reviling as his robe, And it cometh in as water into his midst, And as oil into his bones.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: It is to him as apparel -- he covereth himself, And for a continual girdle he girdeth it on.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: This [is] the wage of mine accusers from Jehovah, And of those speaking evil against my soul.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Thou, O Jehovah Lord, Deal with me for Thy name's sake, Because Thy kindness [is] good, deliver me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For I [am] poor and needy, And my heart hath been pierced in my midst.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: As a shadow when it is stretched out I have gone, I have been driven away as a locust.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: My knees have been feeble from fasting, And my flesh hath failed of fatness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I -- I have been a reproach to them, They see me, they shake their head.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Help me, O Jehovah my God, Save me, according to Thy kindness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they know that this [is] Thy hand, Thou, O Jehovah, Thou hast done it.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They revile, and Thou dost bless, They have risen, and are ashamed, And Thy servant doth rejoice.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Mine accusers put on blushing, and are covered, As an upper robe [is] their shame.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I thank Jehovah greatly with my mouth, And in the midst of many I praise Him,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For He standeth at the right hand of the needy, To save from those judging his soul.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A Psalm of David. The affirmation of Jehovah to my Lord: 'Sit at My right hand, Till I make thine enemies thy footstool.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The rod of thy strength doth Jehovah send from Zion, Rule in the midst of thine enemies.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thy people [are] free-will gifts in the day of Thy strength, in the honours of holiness, From the womb, from the morning, Thou hast the dew of thy youth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah hath sworn, and doth not repent, 'Thou [art] a priest to the age, According to the order of Melchizedek.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The Lord on thy right hand smote kings In the day of His anger.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He doth judge among the nations, He hath completed the carcases, Hath smitten the head over the mighty earth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: From a brook in the way he drinketh, Therefore he doth lift up the head!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Praise ye Jah! I thank Jehovah with the whole heart, In the secret meeting of the upright, And of the company.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Great [are] the works of Jehovah, Sought out by all desiring them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Honourable and majestic is His work, And His righteousness is standing for ever.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A memorial He hath made of His wonders, Gracious and merciful [is] Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Prey He hath given to those fearing Him, He remembereth to the age His covenant.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The power of His works He hath declared to His people, To give to them the inheritance of nations.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The works of His hands [are] true and just, Stedfast [are] all His appointments.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They are sustained for ever to the age. They are made in truth and uprightness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Redemption He hath sent to His people, He hath appointed to the age His covenant, Holy and fearful [is] His name.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The beginning of wisdom [is] fear of Jehovah, Good understanding have all doing them, His praise [is] standing for ever!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Praise ye Jah! O the happiness of one fearing Jehovah, In His commands he hath delighted greatly.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Mighty in the earth is his seed, The generation of the upright is blessed.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Wealth and riches [are] in his house, And his righteousness is standing for ever.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Light hath risen in darkness to the upright, Gracious, and merciful, and righteous.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Good [is] the man -- gracious and lending, He sustaineth his matters in judgment.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For -- to the age he is not moved; For a memorial age-during is the righteous.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of an evil report he is not afraid, Prepared is His heart, confident in Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Sustained is his heart -- he feareth not, Till that he look on his adversaries.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath scattered -- hath given to the needy, His righteousness is standing for ever, His horn is exalted with honour.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The wicked seeth, and hath been angry, His teeth he gnasheth, and hath melted, The desire of the wicked doth perish!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Praise ye Jah! Praise, ye servants of Jehovah. Praise the name of Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The name of Jehovah is blessed, From henceforth, and unto the age.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: From the rising of the sun unto its going in, Praised [is] the name of Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: High above all nations [is] Jehovah, Above the heavens [is] his honour.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Who [is] as Jehovah our God, He is exalting [Himself] to sit?

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He is humbling [Himself] to look On the heavens and on the earth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He is raising up from the dust the poor, From a dunghill He exalteth the needy.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To cause to sit with princes, With the princes of His people.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Causing the barren one of the house to sit, A joyful mother of sons; praise ye Jah!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In the going out of Israel from Egypt, The house of Jacob from a strange people,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Judah became His sanctuary, Israel his dominion.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The sea hath seen, and fleeth, The Jordan turneth backward.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The mountains have skipped as rams, Heights as sons of a flock.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: What -- to thee, O sea, that thou fleest? O Jordan, thou turnest back!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: O mountains, ye skip as rams! O heights, as sons of a flock!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: From before the Lord be afraid, O earth, From before the God of Jacob,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He is turning the rock to a pool of waters, The flint to a fountain of waters!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Not to us, O Jehovah, not to us, But to Thy name give honour, For Thy kindness, for Thy truth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Why do the nations say, 'Where, pray, [is] their God.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And our God [is] in the heavens, All that He hath pleased He hath done.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Their idols [are] silver and gold, work of man's hands,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A mouth they have, and they speak not, Eyes they have, and they see not,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Ears they have, and they hear not, A nose they have, and they smell not,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Their hands, but they handle not, Their feet, and they walk not;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Nor do they mutter through their throat, Like them are their makers, Every one who is trusting in them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: O Israel, trust in Jehovah, 'Their help and their shield [is] He.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: O house of Aaron, trust in Jehovah, 'Their help and their shield [is] He.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Ye fearing Jehovah, trust in Jehovah, 'Their help and their shield [is] He.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah hath remembered us, He blesseth, He blesseth the house of Israel, He blesseth the house of Aaron,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He blesseth those fearing Jehovah, The small with the great.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah addeth to you, to you, and to your sons.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Blessed [are] ye of Jehovah, maker of heaven and earth,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The heavens -- the heavens [are] Jehovah's, And the earth He hath given to sons of men,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The dead praise not Jah, Nor any going down to silence.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And we, we bless Jah, From henceforth, and unto the age. Praise ye Jah!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I have loved, because Jehovah heareth My voice, my supplication,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Because He hath inclined His ear to me, And during my days I call.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Compassed me have cords of death, And straits of Sheol have found me, Distress and sorrow I find.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And in the name of Jehovah I call: I pray Thee, O Jehovah, deliver my soul,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Gracious [is] Jehovah, and righteous, Yea, our God [is] merciful,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A preserver of the simple [is] Jehovah, I was low, and to me He giveth salvation.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Turn back, O my soul, to thy rest, For Jehovah hath conferred benefits on thee.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For Thou hast delivered my soul from death, My eyes from tears, my feet from overthrowing.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I walk habitually before Jehovah In the lands of the living.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I have believed, for I speak, I -- I have been afflicted greatly.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I said in my haste, 'Every man [is] a liar.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: What do I return to Jehovah? All His benefits [are] upon me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The cup of salvation I lift up, And in the name of Jehovah I call.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: My vows to Jehovah let me complete, I pray you, before all His people.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Precious in the eyes of Jehovah [is] the death for His saints.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Cause [it] to come, O Jehovah, for I [am] Thy servant. I [am] Thy servant, son of Thy handmaid, Thou hast opened my bonds.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: To Thee I sacrifice a sacrifice of thanks, And in the name of Jehovah I call.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: My vows to Jehovah let me complete, I pray you, before all His people,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In the courts of the house of Jehovah, In thy midst, O Jerusalem, praise ye Jah!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Praise Jehovah, all ye nations, Glorify Him, all ye peoples.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For mighty to us hath been His kindness, And the truth of Jehovah [is] to the age. Praise ye Jah!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Give ye thanks to Jehovah, For good, for to the age [is] His kindness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I pray you, let Israel say, That, to the age [is] His kindness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I pray you, let the house of Aaron say, That, to the age [is] His kindness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I pray you, let those fearing Jehovah say, That, to the age [is] His kindness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: From the straitness I called Jah, Jah answered me in a broad place.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah [is] for me, I do not fear what man doth to me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jehovah [is] for me among my helpers, And I -- I look on those hating me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Better to take refuge in Jehovah than to trust in man,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Better to take refuge in Jehovah, Than to trust in princes.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All nations have compassed me about, In the name of Jehovah I surely cut them off.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They have compassed me about, Yea, they have compassed me about, In the name of Jehovah I surely cut them off.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: They compassed me about as bees, They have been extinguished as a fire of thorns, In the name of Jehovah I surely cut them off.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thou hast sorely thrust me to fall, And Jehovah hath helped me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: My strength and song [is] Jah, And He is to me for salvation.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A voice of singing and salvation, [Is] in the tents of the righteous, The right hand of Jehovah is doing valiantly.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The right hand of Jehovah is exalted, The right hand of Jehovah is doing valiantly.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I do not die, but live, And recount the works of Jah,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Jah hath sorely chastened me, And to death hath not given me up.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Open ye to me gates of righteousness, I enter into them -- I thank Jah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: This [is] the gate to Jehovah, The righteous enter into it.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I thank Thee, for Thou hast answered me, And art to me for salvation.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A stone the builders refused Hath become head of a corner.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: From Jehovah hath this been, It [is] wonderful in our eyes,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: This [is] the day Jehovah hath made, We rejoice and are glad in it.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I beseech Thee, O Jehovah, save, I pray Thee, I beseech Thee, O Jehovah, prosper, I pray Thee.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Blessed [is] he who is coming In the name of Jehovah, We blessed you from the house of Jehovah,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: God [is] Jehovah, and He giveth to us light, Direct ye the festal-sacrifice with cords, Unto the horns of the altar.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: My God Thou [art], and I confess Thee, My God, I exalt Thee.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Give ye thanks to Jehovah, For good, for to the age, [is] His kindness!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [Aleph.] O the happiness of those perfect in the way, They are walking in the law of Jehovah,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: O the happiness of those keeping His testimonies, With the whole heart they seek Him.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Yea, they have not done iniquity, In His ways they have walked.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thou hast commanded us Thy precepts to keep diligently,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: O that my ways were prepared to keep Thy statutes,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Then I am not ashamed In my looking unto all Thy commands.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I confess Thee with uprightness of heart, In my learning the judgments of Thy righteousness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thy statutes I keep, leave me not utterly!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [Beth.] With what doth a young man purify his path? To observe -- according to Thy word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: With all my heart I have sought Thee, Let me not err from Thy commands.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In my heart I have hid Thy saying, That I sin not before Thee.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Blessed [art] Thou, O Jehovah, teach me Thy statutes.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: With my lips I have recounted All the judgments of Thy mouth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In the way of Thy testimonies I have joyed, As over all wealth.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In Thy precepts I meditate, And I behold attentively Thy paths.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In Thy statutes I delight myself, I do not forget Thy word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [Gimel.] Confer benefits on Thy servant, I live, and I keep Thy word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Uncover mine eyes, and I behold wonders out of Thy law.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A sojourner I [am] on earth, Hide not from me Thy commands.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Broken hath my soul for desire Unto Thy judgments at all times.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thou hast rebuked the cursed proud, Who are erring from Thy commands.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Remove from me reproach and contempt, For Thy testimonies I have kept.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Princes also sat -- against me they spoke, Thy servant doth meditate in Thy statutes,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Thy testimonies also [are] my delight, The men of my counsel!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [Daleth.] Cleaved to the dust hath my soul, Quicken me according to Thy word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: My ways I have recounted, And Thou answerest me, teach me Thy statutes,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The way of Thy precepts cause me to understand, And I meditate in Thy wonders.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: My soul hath dropped from affliction, Establish me according to Thy word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The way of falsehood turn aside from me And with Thy law favour me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The way of faithfulness I have chosen, Thy judgments I have compared,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I have adhered to Thy testimonies, O Jehovah, put me not to shame.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The way of Thy commands I run, For Thou dost enlarge my heart!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [He.] Show me, O Jehovah, the way of Thy statutes, And I keep it -- [to] the end.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Cause me to understand, and I keep Thy law, And observe it with the whole heart.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Cause me to tread in the path of Thy commands, For in it I have delighted.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Incline my heart unto Thy testimonies, And not unto dishonest gain.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Remove mine eyes from seeing vanity, In Thy way quicken Thou me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Establish to Thy servant Thy saying, That [is] concerning Thy fear.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Remove my reproach that I have feared, For Thy judgments [are] good.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Lo, I have longed for Thy precepts, In Thy righteousness quicken Thou me,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [Waw.] And meet me doth Thy kindness, O Jehovah, Thy salvation according to Thy saying.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I answer him who is reproaching me a word, For I have trusted in Thy word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Thou takest not utterly away From my mouth the word of truth, Because for Thy judgment I have hoped.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I keep Thy law continually, To the age and for ever.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I walk habitually in a broad place, For Thy precepts I have sought.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I speak of Thy testimonies before kings, And I am not ashamed.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I delight myself in Thy commands, That I have loved,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I lift up my hands unto Thy commands, That I have loved, And I do meditate on Thy statutes!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [Zain.] Remember the word to Thy servant, On which Thou hast caused me to hope.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: This [is] my comfort in mine affliction, That Thy saying hath quickened me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The proud have utterly scorned me, From Thy law I have not turned aside.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I remembered Thy judgments of old, O Jehovah, And I comfort myself.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Horror hath seized me, Because of the wicked forsaking Thy law.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Songs have been to me Thy statutes, In the house of my sojournings.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I have remembered in the night Thy name, O Jehovah, And I do keep Thy law.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: This hath been to me, That Thy precepts I have kept!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [Cheth.] My portion [is] Jehovah; I have said -- to keep Thy words,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I appeased Thy face with the whole heart, Favour me according to Thy saying.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I have reckoned my ways, And turn back my feet unto Thy testimonies.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I have made haste, And delayed not, to keep Thy commands.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Cords of the wicked have surrounded me, Thy law I have not forgotten.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: At midnight I rise to give thanks to Thee, For the judgments of Thy righteousness.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: A companion I [am] to all who fear Thee, And to those keeping Thy precepts.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of Thy kindness, O Jehovah, the earth is full, Thy statutes teach Thou me!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [Teth.] Good Thou didst with Thy servant, O Jehovah, According to Thy word.
